alerts.evidence: Utah DABS API row: storeQty=1231, warehouseQty=3336, status=1 General Distribution.

alerts.source: Tennessee ABC licensing
alerts.inventorySemantics: Tennessee ABC official public surfaces expose public information/forms and license lists for a private retail market. Treat as source-discovery/license intelligence only; do not produce bottle/store alerts from these sources.
alerts.reason: New statewide_catalog catalog_surface_signal signal for unknown bottle in TN.
alerts.evidence: Licensing Skip to Main Content Go to TN.gov Go to TN.gov Section Go to Alcoholic Beverage Commission (ABC) Licensing Brewer of High Gravity Beer Consumer Education Seminar Delivery Service Farm Winery Fulfillment House Liquor-by-the-Drink Manufacturer Non-Resident Seller Non-Resident Seller Rectifier Retail Food Store Wine Retail Package Store Satellite Facility Wine Making On-Premises Winery Direct Shipper Winery Wholesaler Permitting Armed Forces Import Manager Server Supplier Representative Wholesaler Employee Wholesaler Representative Legal Resources TABC Rules and Regulations Tennessee Code Annotated Title VI Policy and Procedure Commission Matters Minutes Archives Alcohol Awareness Res

alerts.source: ABS Store Inventory and Sale Items open data
alerts.inventorySemantics: Montgomery ABS product search/postback exposes county product rows and HAL/allocated flags. Store-level modal rows remain separate and should only alert as store inventory when extracted.
